economic_notes: Entities accounted for under modified equity method: Chundo Yus Forestry Ltd., Chundo Yus Forestry LLP, Chundo Yus Real Estate Ltd., Chundo Yus Real Estate LLP, Nadleh LP, Lhai Ventures Limited Partnership (22.5% ownership), Lhai Ventures GP Corp. (25% ownership). First Nation operates a store (Nadleh Store). On-reserve housing loan program of $2,000,000 and Treasury Risk Management Facility of $1,440,000.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Seven government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($7,511,016) + Province of BC ($3,451,349) + First Nations Health Authority ($265,056) = $11,227,421. Other aboriginal groups ($1,603,884) includes Carrier Sekani Family Services, Carrier Sekani Tribal Council, First Nations Education Steering Committee — not treated as government transfers. Current liabilities include bank indebtedness ($1,089,647), accounts payable ($384,805), due to government agencies ($28,457), due from related parties ($10,024); deferred revenue shown separately. Prior year included debt forgiveness of $1,407,264 and extinguished replacement reserve of $88,563 as other income. COVID-19 noted as a risk factor.
